title: A Community Project
article_text: The town board has a new holiday plan. They want to put a new machine on the church floor. Anyone can use this machine to mark items. The machine can prove the method works. We need some analysis of the stuff. The election for the club is this season. A wide hotel is near the wall. Let's achieve a great success. The military can direct the project. This series of steps costs only one cent.

sentences.en: The town board has a new holiday plan.
sentences.zh: 镇委员会有一个新的假日计划。

words.eng_def: a group of people who control an organization
a day when people do not work

sentences.en: They want to put a new machine on the church floor.
sentences.zh: 他们想放一台新机器在教堂地板上。

words.eng_def: a piece of equipment with moving parts
a building for religious meetings
the flat surface you walk on inside a building

sentences.en: Anyone can use this machine to mark items.
sentences.zh: 任何人都可以用这台机器标记物品。

words.eng_def: any person
to put a sign on something
a single thing

sentences.en: The machine can prove the method works.
sentences.zh: 这台机器可以证明这个方法有效。

sentences.zh: 我们需要对材料做一些分析。

sentences.zh: 俱乐部的选举是在这个季节。

words.eng_def: a time when people choose someone by voting
a group of people who meet for an activity
one of the four parts of the year

sentences.en: A wide hotel is near the wall.
sentences.zh: 一个宽敞的酒店在墙附近。

words.eng_def: having a large distance from side to side

sentences.zh: 让我们取得巨大的成功。

words.eng_def: to reach a goal

sentences.zh: 军队可以指导这个项目。

to tell someone what to do

sentences.en: This series of steps costs only one cent.
sentences.zh: 这一系列步骤只花一分钱。

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a group of people who control an organization'?
Which word means 'to show that something is true'?
Which word means 'a careful study of something'?
Which word means 'one of the four parts of the year'?

image_prompts: A town board meeting with people sitting around a table discussing a holiday plan.
A new machine sitting on the floor of a church, with people looking at it.
A person using the machine to put marks on items on a table.
A person showing a document with a method written on it, and the machine next to it.
A scientist doing an analysis of some stuff in a laboratory.
A club meeting with people voting in an election during a spring season.
A wide hotel building next to a long wall on a street.
A group of people celebrating a success, with a sign reading 'Achieve'.
Military personnel in uniform directing a construction project.
A series of steps on a paper, with a single cent coin next to it.
